candidates.title: Europe Failed Break Fade Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Fade a failed Europe-open break only after the extension stalls, reversal pressure appears, and price starts snapping back from the stretched edge rather than chasing continuation. candidates.title: London Range Reclaim Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Fade failed London-session extension only after price starts reclaiming back into the recent range with a controlled reversal profile. Corpus anchor: SRC-003: Always remember Wyckoff's second law, the law of cause and effect. If the cause is large, then this will be reflected in the effect, which applies to support and resistance. candidates.title: Europe Selective Breakout Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Trade Europe-open directional breaks only when a balance-area release develops with real follow-through and the move is not immediately fading back into mean-reversion noise. Corpus anchor: SRC-004: The longer a market consolidates in a narrow range, then the more dramatic the resulting price action once the market moves away from this region. candidates.title: Europe Balance Breakout Day Trade
candidates.thesis: Trade Europe-open releases from balance only when price is leaving a tighter range with enough directional expansion to outrun costs without turning into a broad overtraded breakout filter. Corpus anchor: SRC-005: Because the presumption is that momentum in the market will tend to perpetuate itself, the chartist interprets such a pattern as a bullish augury—the stock can be expected to continue to rise.
